endpoints.name: GET /subscriptions/{subscriptionId}/providers/Microsoft.Network/dnszones
endpoints.description: Lists the DNS zones within a resource group.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{SUBSCRIPTIONID}} with a real subscriptionid.

endpoints.name: GET /subscriptions/{subscriptionId}/resourceGroups/{resourceGroupName}/providers/Microsoft.Network/dnszones
endpoints.description: Lists the DNS zones within a resource group.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{SUBSCRIPTIONID}} with a real subscriptionid. Replace {{RESOURCEGROUPNAME}} with a real resourcegroupname.

endpoints.name: GET /subscriptions/{subscriptionId}/resourceGroups/{resourceGroupName}/providers/Microsoft.Network/dnszones/{zoneName}
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{SUBSCRIPTIONID}} with a real subscriptionid. Replace {{ZONENAME}} with a real zonename. Replace {{RESOURCEGROUPNAME}} with a real resourcegroupname.

endpoints.name: PUT /subscriptions/{subscriptionId}/resourceGroups/{resourceGroupName}/providers/Microsoft.Network/dnszones/{zoneName}
endpoints.description: Creates a DNS zone within a resource group.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{SUBSCRIPTIONID}} with a real subscriptionid. Replace {{ZONENAME}} with a real zonename. Replace {{RESOURCEGROUPNAME}} with a real resourcegroupname.

endpoints.name: DELETE /subscriptions/{subscriptionId}/resourceGroups/{resourceGroupName}/providers/Microsoft.Network/dnszones/{zoneName}
endpoints.description: Removes a DNS zone from a resource group.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{SUBSCRIPTIONID}} with a real subscriptionid. Replace {{ZONENAME}} with a real zonename. Replace {{RESOURCEGROUPNAME}} with a real resourcegroupname.

endpoints.name: GET /subscriptions/{subscriptionId}/resourceGroups/{resourceGroupName}/providers/Microsoft.Network/dnszones/{zoneName}/recordsets
endpoints.description: Lists all RecordSets in a DNS zone.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{SUBSCRIPTIONID}} with a real subscriptionid. Replace {{ZONENAME}} with a real zonename. Replace {{RESOURCEGROUPNAME}} with a real resourcegroupname.

endpoints.name: GET /subscriptions/{subscriptionId}/resourceGroups/{resourceGroupName}/providers/Microsoft.Network/dnszones/{zoneName}/{recordType}
endpoints.description: Lists the RecordSets of a specified type in a DNS zone.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{SUBSCRIPTIONID}} with a real subscriptionid. Replace {{RECORDTYPE}} with a real recordtype. Replace {{ZONENAME}} with a real zonename. Replace {{RESOURCEGROUPNAME}} with a real resourcegroupname.

endpoints.name: GET /subscriptions/{subscriptionId}/resourceGroups/{resourceGroupName}/providers/Microsoft.Network/dnszones/{zoneName}/{recordType}/{relativeRecordSetName}
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{RELATIVERECORDSETNAME}} with a real relativerecordsetname. Replace {{SUBSCRIPTIONID}} with a real subscriptionid. Replace {{RECORDTYPE}} with a real recordtype. Replace {{RESOURCEGROUPNAME}} with a real resourcegroupname. Replace {{ZONENAME}} with a real zonename.

endpoints.name: PUT /subscriptions/{subscriptionId}/resourceGroups/{resourceGroupName}/providers/Microsoft.Network/dnszones/{zoneName}/{recordType}/{relativeRecordSetName}

Replace {{SUBSCRIPTIONID}} with a real subscriptionid. Replace {{RECORDTYPE}} with a real recordtype. Replace {{RESOURCEGROUPNAME}} with a real resourcegroupname. endpoints.name: DELETE /subscriptions/{subscriptionId}/resourceGroups/{resourceGroupName}/providers/Microsoft.Network/dnszones/{zoneName}/{recordType}/{relativeRecordSetName}
endpoints.description: Removes a RecordSet from a DNS zone.
